debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
hPerm : l1.Perm l2
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 ≤ l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 ≤ l2.length
elt : α
⊢ (l1.insertIdx idx1 elt).Perm (l2.insertIdx idx2 elt)

failed_attempts: exact (List.perm_insertIdx l1 idx1 elt).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx l2 idx2 elt).symm)

simp [List.insertIdx]; exact List.Perm.refl _
      | cons x xs ih =>
        cases i with
        | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]; exact List.Perm.refl _
        | succ i =>
          simp [List.insertIdx]
          exact (List.Perm.cons _ (ih i)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
    exact (h l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (h l2 idx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).symm)

succ i IH =>
        cases l with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl =>
          simp [List.insertIdx]
          exact (List.Perm.cons _ (IH (Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ hi))).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
    exact (h hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (h hidx2).symm)

exact (List.perm_insertIdx l1 idx1 elt hidx1).trans
        ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx l2 idx2 elt hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx idx1 elt l1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx idx2 elt l2).symm)

have p : ∀ l i, (l.insertIdx i elt).Perm (elt :: l)
      | _, 0 => List.Perm.refl _
      | [], _ + 1 => List.Perm.refl _
      | x :: xs, i + 1 => ((p xs i).cons x).trans (List.Perm.swap x elt xs)
    exact (p l1 idx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (p l2 idx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx idx1 elt l1 hidx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx idx2 elt l2 hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx elt l1 idx1 hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx elt l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx elt l1 idx1 hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx elt l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)

exact (List.perm_insertIdx elt l1 idx1 hidx1).trans
        ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx elt l2 idx2 hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx elt idx1 l1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx elt idx2 l2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx elt l1 idx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx elt l2 idx2).symm)

simp [List.insertIdx]
        | succ i IH => cases l with | nil => contradiction | cons hd tl =>
          simp [List.insertIdx]; exact (List.Perm.cons hd (IH (Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ hi))).trans (List.Perm.swap elt hd tl)
      exact (h hidx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (h hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx idx1 elt l1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx idx2 elt l2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx l1 idx1 elt).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx l2 idx2 elt).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _ hidx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _ hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx hidx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _ hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _ hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx elt idx1 hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx elt idx2 hidx2).symm)

exact (List.perm_insertIdx idx1 elt l1 hidx1).trans
      ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx idx2 elt l2 hidx2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx idx1 elt l1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx idx2 elt l2).symm)
exact (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx _ _ _).symm)

exact (List.perm_insertIdx l1 idx1 elt hidx1).trans
        ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (List.perm_insertIdx l2 idx2 elt hidx2).symm)

succ i IH => cases l with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons x xs =>
            simp [insertIdx]
            exact (IH (Nat.le_of_succ_le_succ hi)).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      exact (h hidx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (h hidx2).symm)

exact (List.perm_insertIdx idx1 elt l1).trans <|
        (hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx idx2 elt l2).symm
exact (List.perm_insertIdx idx1 elt l1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (List.perm_insertIdx idx2 elt l2).symm)

succ i ih => cases l with
          | nil => exact List.Perm.refl _
          | cons x xs => simp [List.insertIdx]; exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih xs)).trans (List.Perm.swap x elt xs)
      exact (h l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (h l2 idx2).symm)

simp [List.insertIdx]
      | cons x xs ih =>
        cases i with
        | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]
        | succ i => simp [List.insertIdx]; exact ((ih i).cons x).trans (List.Perm.swap x elt xs)
    exact (h l1 idx1).trans ((hPerm.cons elt).trans (h l2 idx2).symm)

simp [List.insertIdx]
        | cons x xs ih => cases i with
          | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]
          | succ n => simp [List.insertIdx]; exact (List.Perm.cons x (ih n)).trans (List.Perm.swap ..)
      exact (aux l1 idx1).trans ((List.Perm.cons elt hPerm).trans (aux l2 idx2).symm)
